branches.depositNote: Ibi birinda abataza no kubika itumiza ryawe.

search.title: Shakisha Ibicuruzwa
search.placeholder: Baza ikibazo - "Mufite amata mashya?" cyangwa "Ndashaka ikintu cya su"

hero.subtitle: Supermarket ikunzwe cyane mu Rwanda - ikigaragaza iterambere ry'ubukungu bw'igihugu, ihuza buri munsi ibikenye by'abaturage ba Kigali n'ahandi kuva 2008.

origin.heading: Aho Byatangiriye
origin.paragraph1: SIMBA SUPERMARKET LTD yashinzwe ku wa 3 Ukuboza 2007 nk'Isosiyete y'Inshingano Nkeya ifite intego igaragara: kuba iduka rinini cyane ry'ubucuruzi mu karere. Yashinzwe na Bwana Teklay Teame n'inshuti ze, sosiyete itera mu mahanga ibicuruzwa biva mu Burayi, Misiri, Dubayı, Ubushinwa, Ubuturukiya no handi kugira ngo igwize urutonde rw'ibicuruzwa.
origin.paragraph2: Ugufungurwa gusesuye ku wa 8 Kanama 2008 kwatumye habaho akazi ka abantu barenga 450 b'abanyarwanda. Ifite amashami 11 mu Rwanda hose, Simba itanga serivisi zuzuye z'ubukiranyi - inyama, imigati, kafeteriya n'ibindi byinshi - ikorera imiryango mpuzamahanga, amashyirahamwe y'abaturage, sosiyete za leta n'abikorera.

respect.title: Gukunda Umuntu ku Giti Cye
respect.body: Turi abantu basanzwe bakora cyane bifatanije kugira ngo barangize ibintu bidasanzwe. Twita ku bandi isoni kandi twashishikariza buri wese kuvuga ibitekerezo bye - uko ni ko tugaragaza icyubahiro.

service.title: Serivisi ku Bakiriya
service.body: Abakiriya bacu ni yo mpamvu tubaho mu bucuruzi. Dutanga ibicuruzwa byiza ku giciro cyihuse gikwiye hamwe na serivisi nziza z'abakiriya bishoboka, tugerageza buri gihe kunesha ibyifuzo byabo.

excellence.title: Gushaka Ubuziranenge
excellence.body: Turishimira ibyo turangije ariko ntitugera ku mahoro. Dukomeza gushaka byinshi kugira ngo dutekeleze ibitekerezo n'intego nshya - Ese iyi ni iyo nziza bishoboka? Icyo kibazo niwo mukorere wacu.

2007.label: Gushingwa
2007.desc: Yashinzwe nk'Isosiyete y'Inshingano Nkeya ku wa 3 Ukuboza na Bwana Teklay Teame n'inshuti ze.

2008.label: Ishami rya 1
2008.desc: Ugufungurwa gusesuye ku wa 8 Kanama - Simba Centenary ifunguwe, itera akazi abanyarwanda barenga 450.

2013.label: Igihembo cya 1
2013.desc: Uwagaragaje neza wa 1 mu bucuruzi bw'ibicuruzwa no gutangaza.

2014.label: Kwaguka
2014.desc: Ishami rya Simba Gishushu rifunguwe. Igihembo cya Best Exhibitor mu bucuruzi & gutangaza - EBM.

2015.label: Gukura
2015.desc: Ishami rya Simba Kimironko rifunguwe. Igihamya cyo kwishyura umusoro neza cya RRA gitangwa.

2016.label: Gukomeza Kwaguka
2016.desc: Amashami mabiri mashya afunguwe - Simba Kicukiro na Simba Kigali Height.

2019.label: Hagati y'Umujyi
2019.desc: Simba UTC ifunguwe mu mutima wa Kigali.

2023.label: Kwaguka Gukomeye
2023.desc: Amashami atanu mashya afungurwa icyarimwe - Simba Gacuriro, Simba Gikondo, Simba Sonatube, Simba Kisimenti, na Simba Rebero.

2024.label: Guturika mu Ikoranabuhanga
2024.desc: Simba Online Sales itangwa - iteye serivisi za supermarket mu muryango w'abakiriya.

supermarket.title: Supermarket
supermarket.desc: Amashami 11 mu Rwanda hose atanga urutonde ruryoshe rw'ibicuruzwa by'ibikenye bya buri munsi.

coffee.title: Resitora & Kafeteriya
coffee.desc: Trucillo Café na serivisi za kafeteriya mu mashami 5 ya Simba.

arcade.title: Simba Arcade
arcade.desc: Imyitozo y'imikorere ibonerwa ku ishami rya Simba Gacuriro.

online.title: Kugura kuri Interineti
online.desc: Tugambira abaturage ku muryango wabo - Simba Supermarket ihari hose.

bakery.title: Fabrika y'Imigati
bakery.desc: Fabrika y'imigati yo mu rugo itera imigati mishya ku mashami yacu yose.

coffee.heading: Kafeteriya zacu
coffee.desc: Kafeteriya za Simba hamwe na Trucillo Café imwe mu mashami atanu, zitanga uburambe bwo kuruhuka ku mucuruzi wese.

items.2014: Ugaragaje Neza mu Bucuruzi & Gutangaza - EBM

hero.title: Ibibazo Bikunzwe Gusubirwamo
hero.subtitle: Shaka ibisubizo by'amakuru ku bibazo bisanzwe bijyanye n'ugutura mu Simba Supermarket.

0.a: Sura urubuga rwacu, shakisha ibicuruzwa, ongeraho ibintu mu gitebo cyawe hanyuma ukomeze kwishyura. Uzakenera gushinga konti cyangwa kwinjira kugira ngo urangize kugura.

1.q: Nshobora guhindura cyangwa guhagarika order yanjye nyuma yo kuritya?
1.a: Amalagizo ashobora guhindurwa cyangwa guhagarikwa mu minota 30 nyuma yo kuritya. Nyuma y'igihe cy'amaminota 30, order rinjira mu gusindika kandi impinduka ntizishoboka.

2.q: Nzamenya gute ko order yanjye ryakiranijwe?
2.a: Uzakira imeyili y'inyemeza n'inomero yawe y'order na incamake bihita nyuma yo kwishyura. Ushobora nanone gukurikirana uko order ryawe rikora mu dashibodi yawe.

3.a: Tugiramo MTN Mobile Money, Airtel Money, Visa, Mastercard, no kwishyura iyo mugurishijwe ku malagizo asumba. Ibikorwa byose by'amafaranga kuri interineti birindwa n'uburyo bw'iperereza rya sosiyete.

0.a: Ubu tukohereza mu turere twose tw'ingenzi mu murwa mukuru wa Kigali, harimo Nyamirambo, Kimironko, Kicukiro, Gasabo n'ibidukikije.

1.a: Kohereza bisanzwe bitwara amasaha 2-4 ku bintu biri mu bubiko byalagijwe mbere ya saa 9 z'ijoro. Kohereza by'ihutirwa bigaragara mu kanya k'isaha 1 ku musanzu wo hejuru.

2.q: Hari ingano nke y'order yo kohereza?
2.a: Yego, ingano nke y'order yo kohereza ni RWF 5,000. Amalagizo munsi y'umubare uri hasi asumba kujyana dukani gusa.

3.a: Kohereza bisanzwe bitwara RWF 1,000. Kohereza by'ihutirwa bitwara RWF 2,500. Amalagizo asumba RWF 50,000 asumba kohereza bisanzwe ku buntu.

0.q: Ni iyihe nzira yanyu yo gusubiza?
0.a: Tukiramo gusubiza mu minsi 7 y'ugura ku bintu byinshi bitatezuka, bitegetswe ko bitafunguye kandi biri mu kifurushi cyabo cya mbere hamwe n'icyemezo cy'ugura.

1.a: Wavugana na timu yacu y'ubufasha bw'abakiriya binyuze ku rupapuro rwa Wavugana Natwe cyangwa hamagara imfashanyigisho yacu. Itsinda ryacu rizagutoza inzira yo gusubiza.

2.q: Nzakira ryari amafaranga yanjye yo gusubizwa?
2.a: Amafaranga yo gusubizwa asindikwa mu minsi 3-5 y'akazi gusubiza kupokelwa no kugenzurwa. Gusubizwa kwa Mobile Money bisanzwe bitera vuba kuruta gusubizwa kwa karito.

0.q: Ibicuruzwa byanyu ni bishya kandi birinzwe ubuziranenge?
0.a: Rwose. Imyaka yose mishya, inyama n'ibicuruzwa bya bulateri bigazwa buri munsi kandi bigenzurwa ubuziranenge mbere yo gushyirwa ku makumba. Dukurikira neza amahame y'umutekano w'ibiribwa.

1.a: Yego, Simba ikura ibicuruzwa biva mu Burayi, Dubai, Ubushinwa, Misiri, Ubuturukiya n'ibindi bihugu. Uzabona ibicuruzwa by'amahanga n'ibicuruzwa by'aho byo hose mu bice byose.

2.q: Nshobora kugenzura ubonekezi bw'ibicuruzwa mbere yo kuza?
2.a: Yego, ushobora kuvinjari katalogi yacu yuzuye kuri urubuga cyangwa porogaramu no gutunga ahantu h'ishami kugira ngo ubone ubonekezi bw'ububiko mu gihe nyacyo.

0.a: Kanda Iyandikishe ku rugendo rw'hejuru, injiza izina ryawe, numero ya telefone cyangwa aderesi ya imeyili, hanyuma ushinge ijambo ry'ibanga. Ushobora kandi kwiyandikisha vuba usimbuye konti yawe ya Google.

1.q: Nibagiwe ijambo ryanjye ry'ibanga. Ngomba gukora iki?
1.a: Kanda Nibagiwe Ijambo ry'ibanga ku rupapuro rwo kwinjira hanyuma ushyireho aderesi ya imeyili yawe yanditswe. Uzakira uhuza wo gushaka vuba mu minota mike.

2.q: Nzahindura gute aderesi yanjye yo kohereza?
2.a: Injira muri konti yawe, jya kuri Igenamiterere, hanyuma uhitemo Aderesi. Ushobora kongeraho, guhindura cyangwa gukuraho aderesi zo kohereza uturutse aho.

contact.heading: Uracyafite ibibazo?
contact.body: Itsinda ryacu riraboneka iminsi 7 mu cyumweru kugufasha na byose ukeneye.

hero.title: Inzira yo Gusubiza
hero.subtitle: Turifuza ko wizera neza ku kugura kwose. Niba hari ikibazo, tuzakigira neza.

items.unopened: Ibintu bitafunguye mu kifurushi cyabo cya mbere
items.damaged: Ibicuruzwa byangiritse cyangwa bifite inenge ku gutangwa

items.perishable: Imyaka mishya, inyama n'ibicuruzwa bitateza vuba
items.used: Ubwiteganyirize bw'umuntu ku giti cye n'ibiturire byafunguwe cyangwa byakoreshejwe

process.heading: Uburyo bwo gusubiza igicuruzwa
process.subtitle: Kurikira iyi nzira yoroshye kandi itsinda ryacu rizashughulikira ibisigaye.

contact.title: Wavugana na itsinda ryacu
contact.desc: Fika binyuze ku rupapuro rwa Wavugana Natwe, hamagara imfashanyigisho yacu, cyangwa sura ishami iriyeri rya Simba mu minsi 7 y'ugura.

pack.title: Pakira igicuruzwa
pack.desc: Menya neza ko igicuruzwa kiri mu kifurushi cyacyo cya mbere hamwe n'ibikoresho byose, ibirangantego n'inyemeza yawe.

drop.title: Kura cyangwa hanga gukorwa
drop.desc: Jyana igicuruzwa mu ishami iriyeri rya Simba cyangwa saba gukorwa uturuka ku aderesi yawe ku musanzu muto.

refund.title: Akira gusubizwa kwawe
refund.desc: Nyuma yo kugenzurwa no kwemezwa, gusubizwa kwawe kuzatangwa mu minsi 3-5 y'akazi.

original.title: Uburyo bwo kwishyura bwa mbere
original.desc: Gusubizwa ku karito cyangwa konti ya Mobile Money yakoreshejwe mu kugura kwa mbere.

storeCredit.title: Inguzanyo ya dukani
storeCredit.desc: Akira umubare wose nk'inguzanyo ya dukani, ifite agaciro k'amezi 12 mu mashami yose ya Simba.

exchange.title: Guhindura
exchange.desc: Hindura n'igicuruzwa kimwe cya kimwe cyangwa igicuruzwa cy'agaciro kingana mu ishami iriyeri rya Simba.

note.heading: Icyitonderwa cy'ingenzi
note.body: Simba Supermarket ibika uburenganzira bwo kwanga gusubiza bitatujuje amabwiriza ya politiki yacu. Ibintu byaguriwe mu dukani bigomba gusubizwa mu ishami rya fiziki; amalagizo ya interineti ashobora gusubizwa mu dukani cyangwa binyuze muri serivisi yacu yo gukorwa.

privacy.intro: Muri Simba Supermarket, ibanga ryawe ribabwiye cyane. Iyi politiki isobanura uburyo tukusanya, dukoreshamo no kurinda amakuru yawe bwite iyo ugurira natwe kuri interineti cyangwa mu dukani.

collection.heading: Amakuru Dukusanya
collection.body: Dukusanya amakuru utanga mubanze no amakuru avutse iyo ukoresha serivisi zacu.

points.0: Izina, aderesi ya imeyili na numero ya telefone iyo wiyandikisha
points.1: Aderesi yo kohereza n'amakuru y'uburyo bwo kwishyura
points.2: Amateka y'amalagizo no imyitwarire yo guvinjari ibicuruzwa
points.3: Ubwoko bw'igikoresho, aderesi ya IP n'amakuru ya murandasi

use.heading: Uburyo Tukoreshamo Amakuru Yawe
use.body: Data yawe ikoreshwa gusa guteza imbere uburambe bwawe bwo kugura no gukora inshingano zacu z'ubufasha.

points.1: Kohereza inyemeza z'amalagizo n'amakuru y'uko bikoherezwa

sharing.heading: Gusangira Amakuru Yawe
sharing.body: Ntidukuruza data yawe bwite. Dushobora kuyisangira gusa n'abafatanyabikorwa b'ubufasha bemewe.

points.0: Abafatanyabikorwa bo kohereza gusohoza amalagizo yawe
points.1: Abasindikantumwa b'amafaranga gukora ibikorwa by'amafaranga mu mutekano

security.heading: Uburyo Turinda Data Yawe
security.body: Dukoresha imyitozo y'umutekano ya standard y'inganda harimo ndetse no SSL encryption, seriveri zifite umutekano n'ubusuzumwe bw'umutekano buhoraho kurinda amakuru yawe bwite yinjirwa n'ubitavugwa.

cookies.heading: Cookies n'Gukurikirana
cookies.body: Dukoresha cookies kugira ngo tubutse impamvu zawe, tukugumane wanditse kandi tusobanukirwe uburyo ukoresha urubuga rwacu. Ushobora kuzikuraho mu igenamiterere rya murandasi wawe, nubwo bimwe mu bikorwa bishobora gukorana neza.

contact.heading: Ibibazo Bijyanye n'Ibanga Ryawe
contact.body: Niba ufite ibibazo bijyanye na iyi politiki cyangwa ugomba gukoresha uburenganzira bwawe bwa data, Wavugana na Perezida w'Uburinzi bw'Amakuru wacu ku privacy@simbasupermarket.rw cyangwa sura imwe mu mashami yacu.

rights.heading: Uburenganzira Bwawe
rights.body: Hakurikijwe amategeko agenga uburinzi bw'amakuru ashobora gukurikizwa, ufite uburenganzira bukurikira ku makuru yawe bwite.

hero.title: Amakuru y'Ukohereza
hero.subtitle: Kohereza vuba no kwizerana biva ku mashami yacu mubanze kugera ku muryango wawe i Kigali no hanze.

standard.title: Bisanzwe
standard.note: Beza ku kugura byateganyijwe. Lagiza mbere ya saa 9 z'ijoro kwa kohereza bisanzwe uwo munsi.

express.title: By'ihutirwa
express.note: Ukeneye vuba? Kohereza by'ihutirwa bitura order ryawe mu kanya gito cy'isaha imwe.

sameDay.title: Kohereza Bure
sameDay.note: Amalagizo asumba RWF 50,000 asumba kohereza bisanzwe ku buntu.

zones.heading: Inzego zo Kohereza
zones.subtitle: Ubu tukohereza mu turere twose tw'ingenzi mu Kigali. Akarere kenshi karaza vuba.

order.title: Shyira order ryawe
order.desc: Ongeraho ibintu mu gitebo cyawe hanyuma uhitemo kohereza igihe cy'kwishyura.

confirm.title: order ryemejwe
confirm.desc: Ukira inyemeza ya SMS n'imeyili bihita.

dispatch.title: Ryatumwe
dispatch.desc: Itsinda ryacu ripakira order ryawe mu ishami riri hafi.

deliver.title: Ryatanzwe kuri we
deliver.desc: Umushoferi wacu atanza ku muryango wawe mu gihe cyashinganiwe.

cutoff.title: Amasaha y'imperuka y'amalagizo
cutoff.desc: Amalagizo yashyizwe nyuma ya saa 1 za joro azatangwa bukeye bwaho uhereye saa 2 za mu gitondo.

packaging.title: Gupakira
packaging.desc: Amalagizo yose apakiwa mu mwakagari no mu mutekano kugira ngo ubuziranenge bubungabungwe.

tracking.title: Gukurikirana order
tracking.desc: Kurikirana ukohereza kwawe mu gihe nyacyo binyuze muri porogaramu cyangwa uhuza gw'ikurikirana cya SMS.

failed.title: Kohereza byanze
failed.desc: Niba tutashobora kukugera, tuzabika order ryawe amasaha 2 mbere yo kugishyira inyuma. Umusanzu wo kohereza bishya ushobora gukurikira.

contact.heading: Ibibazo bijyanye no kohereza?
contact.body: Itsinda ryacu ry'ubufasha riraboneka iminsi 7 mu cyumweru.

hero.title: Amabwiriza y'Imikoreshereze
hero.subtitle: Nyamuneka soma amabwiriza haya neza mbere yo gukoresha urubuga rwacu, porogaramu y'igikoresho, cyangwa serivisi yose ya Simba Supermarket.

terms.banner: Mu kugera ku cyangwa gukoresha serivisi yose ya Simba Supermarket, wemereza ko wasomye, wasobanukirwe, kandi ukubaliye kugengwa n'Amabwiriza haya y'Imikoreshereze. Niba utabikubaliye, nyamuneka udakoreshe serivisi zacu.

acceptance.heading: Kwemera Amabwiriza
acceptance.body: Amabwiriza haya y'Imikoreshereze agenga gukoresha urubuga rwa Simba Supermarket, porogaramu y'igikoresho, na serivisi zose zijyanye. Mu gushinga konti, gushyira ilagizo, cyangwa gusa kuvinjari urubuga rwacu, wemereza ko wasomye kandi ukubaliye amabwiriza haya. Amabwiriza haya akurikizwa ku bakoreshaji bose harimo inzira, abakiriya biyandikishije, n'abakiriya bo gukorana. Simba Supermarket ibika uburenganzira bwo guhindura amabwiriza haya igihe icyo aricyo cyose. Gukomeza gukoresha serivisi zacu nyuma y'impinduka bivuze kwemera amabwiriza yavuguruwe.

purchases.heading: Kugura no Gushyira Amalagizo
purchases.body: Igihe ushyira ilagizo kuri Simba Supermarket, uri gukora itera ryo kugura ibicuruzwa munsi y'amabwiriza haya. Amalagizo yose ateganye n'ubonekezi no kwemezwa.

points.0: Amalagizo yemezwa gusa nyuma yo kwishyura cyangwa gutunga uburenganzira bwo kwishyura
points.1: Ibiciro bigaragazwa mu Francs z'u Rwanda (RWF) kandi birimo imisoro ikurikizwa
points.2: Tubika uburenganzira bwo guhagarika amalagizo kubera ibicuruzwa byo hafi cyangwa amakosa y'ibiciro
points.3: Amalagizo menshi cyangwa y'ubucuruzi ashobora gusaba guterana mbere kandi agenga amabwiriza ahiwe

payments.heading: Amabwiriza y'Kwishyura
payments.body: Simba Supermarket ikiramo MTN Mobile Money, Airtel Money, Visa, Mastercard, no kwishyura iyo mugurishijwe ku malagizo asumba. Kwishyura kwa kuri interineti kwose gusindikwa binyuze muri lango likingiritswe. Mu gutanga amakuru y'kwishyura, wemereza ko uri uremezwa gukoresha uburyo bwo kwishyura. Mu gihe kwishyura byanze, ilagizo ryawe rizahagarikwa kandi uzabibwiwa. Impaka zose zijyanye n'amafaranga zigomba kuzarizwa ku tsinda ryacu ry'ubufasha bw'abakiriya mu minsi 14 y'igikorwa.

liability.heading: Kugabanya Inshingano
liability.body: Mu rugero rwose rw'amategeko, Simba Supermarket ntizarenganurwa na bimwe mu byangirika by'indirecte, by'impanuka, cyangwa bisohoye bivuye mu gukoresha serivisi zacu.

points.0: Ntidufite inshingano kubera gutagira igihe bisabwa n'impamvu zirenze ubushobozi bwacu
points.1: Inshingano zacu ku itakwa iriyeri zigabanyirizwa agaciro k'ilagizo ryanzaniwe
points.2: Ntidutanga ingwate y'imikoreshereze itigize cyangwa idafite amakosa y'urubuga rwacu rwa dijital
points.3: Amafoto y'ibicuruzwa ni ay'igaragaza gusa; ibicuruzwa nyabyo bishobora guhinduka buke

prohibited.heading: Ibikorwa Biburiwe
prohibited.body: Wemereza kutakoresha nabi serivisi zacu cyangwa gufasha abandi kubikora. Ibikorwa bikurikira biburiwe cyane:

points.0: Gukoresha urubuga rwacu ku mpamvu zose z'ubuswa, inzibucike, cyangwa zaangiza
points.1: Kugerageza kubona uburenganzira bwatavugwa ku sisitemi zacu cyangwa amakuru
points.2: Gutanga ibitekerezo cyangwa ibikubiyemo by'ibinyoma, by'uburiganya, cyangwa by'agahato
points.3: Gucuruza ibicuruzwa byaguriwe muri Simba utabanje kubona uruhushya rwanditse

disputes.heading: Gukemura Impaka
disputes.body: Mu gihe cy'impaka zivuye muri amabwiriza haya cyangwa mu gukoresha serivisi zacu, dukushishikariza mbere wasiliane na tsinda ryacu ry'ubufasha bw'abakiriya gushaka ibisubizo by'amahoro. Niba impaka zidashobora gukemurwa mu buryo busanzwe, zizaroherezwa ku nkiko zisumba za Rwanda hakurikijwe amategeko y'u Rwanda akurikizwa. Simba Supermarket yiyemeje kugatura no kugaragaza ibisubizo bya buri kijyana na abakiriya.

changes.heading: Impinduka kuri Amabwiriza Haya
changes.body: Simba Supermarket ibika uburenganzira bwo guhindura Amabwiriza haya y'Imikoreshereze igihe icyo aricyo cyose. Igihe dukora impinduka nini, tuzabibwira abakoreshaji biyandikishije binyuze ku imeyili cyangwa menyesha rya porogaramu nibura iminsi 14 mbere y'impinduka gutangira gukurikizwa. Itariki itangira gukurikizwa hejuru y'iyi paji izahoraho igaragaza ivugururo rya vuba cyane. Gukomeza gukoresha serivisi zacu nyuma y'itariki itangira gukurikizwa bivuze kwemera amabwiriza yavuguruwe.

contact.heading: Wasiliana Natwe
contact.body: Niba ufite ibibazo, ibibabishe, cyangwa ibisabwa bijyanye n'Amabwiriza haya y'Imikoreshereze, nyamuneka ntugire ubwoba wo kuwasiliana natwe. Amatsinda yacu y'amategeko n'ubufasha bw'abakiriya ariboneka kukufasha. Ushobora kuwasiliana natwe binyuze ku rupapuro rwa Wasiliana Natwe kurubuga rwacu, mu kohereza imeyili kuri legal@simbasupermarket.rw, cyangwa mu gusura imwe mu mashami yacu 11 mu Rwanda.

agreement.heading: Urinzwe
agreement.body: Amabwiriza haya arahabwa kurinda wewe na Simba Supermarket. Yiyemeje kugaragaza, uburinganire, n'ubufasha budasanzwe ku mukiriya wese.
